confidence_rationale: Clear view of all major phases and object transfers. Completion time estimated from instrument appearance to final placement. No obvious drops or penalties observed.
cannot_determine: Exact frame-by-frame timing due to video compression
Whether any objects briefly touched the field boundary
technique_summary: Good intermediate-level performance with smooth transfers and proper hand coordination. Completion time of 78 seconds places this in the intermediate range (60-120s).
strengths: Clean midair transfers without dropping objects
Proper hand role reversal for reverse direction
improvement_suggestions: Reduce transfer time to reach expert level (<60 seconds)
Practice faster pickup and placement motions
